mechanism_narrative: Higher federal funds rates increase the discount rate applied to future equity cash flows, reducing present valuations and generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Rank IC for FEDFUNDS is positive or statistically insignificant (p > 0.1) over the 20-day horizon in a 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Housing starts falling below 1.3 million units signals a structural collapse in the housing sector, dragging down construction and related manufacturing activity, leading to negative equity returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: S&P 500 forward 60-day returns are positive in > 55% of instances where HOUST < 1300.

mechanism_narrative: A simultaneous rise in the unemployment rate and a decline in real GDP confirms a recessionary onset, leading to sharp negative equity returns as earnings expectations are downgraded over the next month.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE MoM change > 0.1 AND GDPC1 MoM change < 0
failure_condition: The joint signal fails to predict negative returns with an accuracy > 60% in out-of-sample recession periods.

mechanism_narrative: In a late-cycle expansion, a deceleration in Industrial Production indicates peak capacity utilization and impending demand weakness, forecasting negative equity returns over the next month.
failure_condition: The negative correlation between INDPRO growth and SPX returns disappears or reverses during late-cycle regimes.

mechanism_narrative: When CPI inflation exceeds 205 (approx 2.5% YoY), the probability of restrictive monetary policy increases, compressing equity valuations and generating negative forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Forward returns are not significantly lower when CPIAUCSL > 205 compared to when CPIAUCSL < 205 (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A divergence where Real Sales remain elevated while Housing Starts collapse signals a fragile economy reliant on consumer credit, predicting negative returns over the next quarter as the credit cycle turns.
failure_condition: The interaction term between RSAFS and HOUST has a positive or insignificant coefficient in a predictive regression of 60-day returns.

mechanism_narrative: Higher total non-farm payrolls indicate robust labor market demand and consumer spending power, supporting corporate earnings and generating positive equity returns over the next week.
failure_condition: Rank IC for PAYEMS is negative or statistically insignificant (p > 0.1) over the 5-day horizon.

mechanism_narrative: A month-over-month decline in Industrial Production greater than 1.0% signals a sudden supply-side shock or demand collapse, triggering immediate negative equity returns over the next week.
failure_condition: S&P 500 forward 5-day returns are positive in > 50% of instances where INDPRO drops > 1.0% MoM.
